label: reconstruction_credibility_v1
purpose: quantify data support, conditional detector-noise uncertainty, residual structure, prior sensitivity and blank false positives without using a truth map as the credibility measure

conditional_bootstrap.interpretation: conditional on the declared forward operator, basis, support, active solution basin and selected regulariser; not an experimental model-discrepancy interval

prior_sensitivity.interpretation: same raw observation and basis, changing only the declared curvature weight

blank_ensemble.interpretation: development false-positive baseline; not an acceptance threshold for experimental data

claims_boundary.forbidden_interpretation: a clean reconstruction image alone is not evidence that every displayed feature is measured
